title: draba hyperborea var. spathulata
intro: Draba hyperborea var. spathulata, also known as Arctic cress, is a plant species that belongs to the mustard family (Brassicaceae) and is native to the Arctic tundra regions of North America and Eurasia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues and skin infections. The health benefits of Draba hyperborea var. spathulata include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and boost the immune system, making it a valuable plant for natural remedies. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, or used in topical creams and ointments to harness its medicinal properties.
